name: Mutiara Harapan Islamic School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Pondok Kacang Raya No. 2, Pondok Kacang Timur, Pondok Aren, Tangerang Selatan 15426, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Mutiara Harapan fills a gap for Muslim families who want Cambridge qualifications combined with genuine Islamic values.
paragraphs: Parents say Mutiara Harapan fills a gap for Muslim families who want Cambridge qualifications combined with genuine Islamic values.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.8K – US$8K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Libraries, Mosque, Sports facilities.

metaDescription: Mutiara Harapan Islamic School (Greater Jakarta). Parents say Mutiara Harapan fills a gap for Muslim families who want Cambridge qualifications combined with genuine Islamic values.…
